entries.text: KS wants to track her health this year — weight, mental and physical health. Wears an Oura Ring for sleep tracking.
Set up Oura MCP server (tomekkorbak/oura-mcp-server) for sleep data access. Token configured.
KS sleep scores: Feb 20 = 83 (good REM 99, low efficiency 69, high latency 56), Feb 21 = 82 (strong deep 95, REM 96, short total sleep 75).
KS wants daily 7:30am sleep briefing via DM — no calendar event, just a message.
KS wants Janet to have personality, be bright and optimistic, take initiative as a second brain and confidant.
KS does NOT want recurring check-ins cluttering her calendar.
Architecture: using Claude Code on Mac Mini (not OpenClaw), happy with current backend. Drawing inspiration from OpenClaw-style architecture only.
Built daily journal system — auto-tags conversations as idea/issue/decision/followup, stores in journals/ dir by date. KS prefers to trigger summary on demand, no automatic end-of-day digest.
KS does NOT want automatic end-of-day digest — prefers to ask for journal summary when she's ready. Janet can nudge if items are piling up.
Granola integration: using official MCP (mcp.granola.ai), NOT custom granola.js module. Claude queries Granola MCP tools directly when needed — no pre-loading into prompt.
Morning schedule: 7:30am sleep briefing (Oura), 8:30am workday kickoff (Granola debrief — yesterday's action items, today's meeting prep). Pre-meeting prep via heartbeat 15-30min before meetings.
KS started Mounjaro on Tuesday Feb 17, 2026 for weight management. First week: experienced nausea during polo (Feb 22) — likely from exercising on light stomach while body adjusts.
Weekly Mounjaro check-in every Sunday 6pm — ask about side effects, weight, exercise tolerance. Tracked via journal entries.
KS wants Claude usage reported as percentage, NOT dollar amounts. Daily 9pm usage report added to scheduled briefings.
KS had late meal + stress on Feb 21 night — sleep score dropped to 71. Late eating and stress are confirmed sleep disruptors for her.
